Test result: node --test plugins/remem/apps/remem/server.test.js passed for dashboard/app endpoint behavior.
Notes: Plugin app server tests covered route-level user behavior.

Feature / capability: MCP-style app endpoint and UI resource
User story: As an Apps SDK tester, I want `/mcp` to list/call tools and serve `ui://remem/dashboard.html`.
Expected behavior based on code: Server handles JSON-RPC initialize/tools/list/tools/call/resources/list/resources/read and returns tool descriptors/resource HTML.
Test result: node --test plugins/remem/apps/remem/server.test.js passed for dashboard/app endpoint behavior.
Notes: Plugin app server tests covered route-level user behavior.

User story: As a local app user, I want the unauthenticated app server constrained to loopback and safe local POST origins.
Expected behavior based on code: Server rejects non-loopback host args/requests and enforces local POST policy; body size is capped at 1 MB.
Test result: node --test plugins/remem/apps/remem/request-security.test.js passed.
Notes: Local request safety checks passed.

User story: As an npm user, I want the `@remem-ai/remem` wrapper to install/run the matching remem binary safely.
Expected behavior based on code: npm wrapper behavior is tested separately and version sync is enforced with Rust/plugin metadata.
Test result: node --test npm/remem/scripts/install.test.js passed.
Notes: npm wrapper install behavior covered by package test.

User story: As a maintainer, I want Rust, Cargo.lock, plugin manifest, release manifest, and npm package versions synchronized before release.
Expected behavior based on code: CI gate checks `Cargo.toml`, `Cargo.lock`, `.codex-plugin/plugin.json`, `runtimes/remem-releases.json`, and `npm/remem/package.json`.
Test result: python3 scripts/ci/check_plugin_version_sync.py passed; check_version_bump.py origin/main HEAD reported no binary-impacting files changed.
Notes: Initial QA run stayed at 0.5.118; this PR bumps Cargo/plugin/npm release metadata to 0.5.119 because it touches src/** test infrastructure.
